entities.name: Referrals
entities.context: The hiring/sourcing mechanism V is analyzing - core to his business thesis

entities.name: Artisanal wells metaphor
entities.context: V's framework: referrals are finite resources that don't replenish, like natural aquifers

entities.name: Tap water vs bottled water dynamic
entities.context: V's observation about market hypocrisy - people claim to use standard sourcing but secretly prefer referrals

relationships.context: Explains why referrals are scarce and valuable - they don't refresh like aquifers

relationships.from: Tap water vs bottled water dynamic
relationships.context: Captures the gap between stated behavior (using tap water/standard hiring) and actual preference (buying bottled water/using referrals)
